title: Bitcoin Faces $14 Billion Options Expiry While Middle East Turmoil Mounts
summary: Bitcoin’s largest options expiry of the year is colliding with geopolitical volatility that shows no sign of letting up with make or break peace talks uncertain.

title: The Startup Selling Full-Body Scans as the Future of Health Care
summary: Step into the machine at Neko Health or one of its rivals to check for skin cancer, diabetes or stroke risk. Is this the next frontier in preventative health care, or something your primary care physician would rather you avoid?

title: Why investors should put 10% of their money in gold, says this strategist
summary: Most of the motivations for gold that have driven the price up so forcefully in the past year are still applicable, according to strategist Tom Bruce.
